notes: Hand-curated classic dishes. Methods are intentionally brief and describe general technique rather than detailed copyrighted procedures.

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
recipes.about: Italian sliced tomato, fresh mozzarella, and basil dressed with olive oil.
recipes.method: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella roughly the same thickness. Alternate on a plate with whole basil leaves. Drizzle with olive oil; finish with salt and pepper.
recipes.tips: Quality matters more than technique — peak-season tomatoes and the best mozzarella you can find.

recipes.name: Tomato Basil Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta with a quick tomato-garlic-basil sauce, finished with parmesan.
recipes.method: Sauté garlic in olive oil until fragrant. Add crushed tomatoes; simmer 15 minutes. Toss with cooked pasta; finish with torn basil and grated parmesan.

recipes.name: Pesto Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta tossed with basil pesto: pine nuts, parmesan, garlic, and olive oil.
recipes.method: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, parmesan, and olive oil into a paste. Loosen with pasta water; toss with cooked pasta off the heat.
recipes.tips: Don't overheat the pesto or it'll turn dull green and lose its punch.

recipes.name: Aglio e Olio
recipes.about: Spaghetti with garlic, olive oil, chili flakes, and parsley.
recipes.method: Slice garlic thin. Cook gently in olive oil with chili until just pale gold. Toss with cooked spaghetti and a splash of pasta water; finish with parsley.
recipes.tips: Burnt garlic is bitter — pull the pan off the heat the moment the slivers turn pale.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.about: Toasted bread topped with tomato, basil, garlic, and olive oil.
recipes.method: Toast or grill bread. Rub with raw garlic. Top with diced tomatoes mixed with olive oil, basil, and salt.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.about: Creamy Italian rice with sautéed mushrooms, parmesan, and thyme.
recipes.method: Sauté mushrooms separately. In another pan: shallot in butter, then rice, then wine, then warm stock added a ladle at a time, stirring until rice is creamy. Stir in butter, parmesan, mushrooms, thyme.
recipes.tips: Keep the stock hot — adding cold liquid stops the cook and makes the rice gummy.

recipes.name: Brown-Butter Sage Squash Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta with roasted butternut squash, brown butter, sage, and parmesan.
recipes.method: Roast squash cubes at 425°F until caramelized. Brown butter with sage leaves until nutty. Toss pasta, squash, and butter; finish with parmesan.

recipes.name: Mac and Cheese
recipes.about: Pasta in a cheddar cheese sauce, baked or stovetop.
recipes.method: Make a roux with butter and flour; whisk in milk and simmer to thicken. Off heat, melt in cheddar. Toss with cooked pasta; bake with breadcrumbs if desired.

recipes.name: Roasted Chicken
recipes.about: Whole chicken roasted with lemon, herbs, and garlic.
recipes.method: Pat dry; salt generously inside and out. Stuff cavity with lemon halves, herb sprigs, garlic. Rub with butter. Roast at 425°F until thigh reads 165°F internal, about 60–75 minutes.
recipes.tips: Rest 10–15 minutes before carving so the juices settle.

recipes.name: Chicken Piccata
recipes.about: Chicken cutlets in a lemon-caper-butter sauce with parsley.
recipes.method: Pound chicken thin, dredge in flour, sear in butter. Remove. Deglaze with wine and lemon juice; add capers; whisk in cold butter to finish. Garnish with parsley.

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.about: Chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms, bacon, onions, and thyme.
recipes.method: Brown chicken pieces; remove. Cook bacon, then onions and mushrooms. Return chicken; add red wine, stock, thyme, bay leaf. Braise covered ~1 hour until tender.
recipes.tips: Use a wine you'd actually drink — bad wine doesn't hide in long cooks.

recipes.name: Shrimp Scampi
recipes.about: Shrimp sautéed in garlic butter with lemon, parsley, and chili.
recipes.method: Sauté garlic in butter and olive oil. Add shrimp; cook just until pink, about 2 minutes per side. Deglaze with wine and lemon; finish with parsley.

recipes.name: Salmon with Dill
recipes.about: Salmon fillets cooked in butter and finished with lemon and dill.
recipes.method: Salt salmon. Pan-sear skin-side down in butter until skin is crisp; flip briefly to finish. Finish with lemon juice, capers, and dill.

recipes.name: Miso-Glazed Salmon
recipes.about: Salmon glazed with miso and ginger, finished with scallions.
recipes.method: Whisk miso, mirin (or sugar), soy, and grated ginger; brush on salmon. Broil or bake at 425°F until edges caramelize and salmon flakes. Garnish with scallions and sesame.

recipes.name: Pork Chops with Apples
recipes.about: Seared pork chops with apples cooked in butter and sage.
recipes.method: Season pork chops; sear in butter on both sides. Remove. In the same pan, cook sliced apples, onion, and sage until soft. Return pork to warm through.

recipes.name: Maple-Mustard Pork Tenderloin
recipes.about: Pork tenderloin glazed with maple syrup and mustard, roasted with garlic and thyme.
recipes.method: Whisk mustard, maple syrup, garlic, and thyme. Brush over pork tenderloin. Roast at 400°F until 145°F internal, about 20 minutes. Rest before slicing.

recipes.name: Beef Stew
recipes.about: Beef simmered with onions, carrots, red wine, and herbs until tender.
recipes.method: Brown beef chunks in batches. Sauté onions, carrots, garlic in the same pot. Deglaze with wine. Add stock, thyme, bay leaf. Cover and simmer 2–2½ hours until fork-tender.

recipes.name: Rosemary Garlic Lamb
recipes.about: Lamb roasted with rosemary, garlic, olive oil, and lemon.
recipes.method: Score the fat. Rub with crushed garlic, rosemary, olive oil, lemon zest, and salt. Roast at 400°F until 130°F internal for medium-rare. Rest 15 minutes.

recipes.name: Lamb with Yogurt and Mint
recipes.about: Spiced lamb served with a cool yogurt-mint sauce.
recipes.method: Spice-rub lamb with cumin, garlic, and salt. Sear or grill to desired doneness. Serve with a sauce of yogurt, chopped mint, crushed garlic, and lemon.

recipes.name: Duck à l'Orange
recipes.about: Roast duck with a sweet-tart orange sauce, finished with thyme.
recipes.method: Score the duck breast skin; render fat in a cold pan over low heat until skin is crisp. Flip briefly. For the sauce: reduce orange juice, zest, and a splash of vinegar; finish with butter.

recipes.name: Cobb Salad
recipes.about: Composed salad with chicken, bacon, avocado, egg, and blue cheese.
recipes.method: Lay down a bed of chopped lettuce. Arrange neat rows of diced chicken, crumbled bacon, avocado, halved hard-boiled eggs, tomato, and blue cheese. Dress with vinaigrette.

recipes.name: Greek Salad
recipes.about: Tomatoes, cucumbers, feta, olives, and red onion with oregano and olive oil.
recipes.method: Chop tomatoes and cucumbers into chunks; thinly slice red onion. Combine with cubed feta and olives. Dress with olive oil, dried oregano, and salt.

recipes.name: Watermelon Feta Mint
recipes.about: Cubed watermelon with feta and torn mint — a summer salad.
recipes.method: Cube watermelon. Crumble feta over. Tear mint leaves on top. Drizzle olive oil and a squeeze of lime.

recipes.name: Pear Blue Cheese Salad
recipes.about: Sliced pear with blue cheese, walnuts, and arugula.
recipes.method: Slice pears thin. Arrange on arugula. Crumble blue cheese; scatter walnuts. Drizzle olive oil with a touch of honey.

recipes.name: Tzatziki
recipes.about: Greek yogurt sauce with cucumber, dill, mint, and garlic.
recipes.method: Grate cucumber, salt, and drain in a strainer 15 minutes; squeeze dry. Stir into thick yogurt with minced garlic, dill, mint, and a drizzle of olive oil.
recipes.tips: The cucumber-draining step keeps it thick — skip it and you get watery tzatziki.

recipes.name: Hummus
recipes.about: Pureed chickpeas with tahini, lemon, garlic, and olive oil.
recipes.method: Blend cooked chickpeas with tahini, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and ice water. Process for 5+ minutes for the silkiest texture.
recipes.tips: Peeling the chickpeas (or using cooked-soft ones) gives a noticeably creamier texture.

recipes.name: Baba Ganoush
recipes.about: Smoky roasted eggplant with tahini, lemon, garlic, and olive oil.
recipes.method: Char whole eggplants over flame or under the broiler until skin blackens and flesh collapses. Cool, scoop the flesh, mash with tahini, lemon, garlic, and olive oil.

recipes.name: Tomato Soup
recipes.about: Tomatoes simmered with onion, butter, and basil; finished with cream.
recipes.method: Sauté onion in butter until soft. Add tomatoes (canned or fresh) and simmer 20 minutes. Blend until smooth. Stir in basil and cream off the heat.

recipes.name: Apple Pie Filling
recipes.about: Apples cooked with cinnamon, butter, and a touch of nutmeg.
recipes.method: Peel and slice apples thin. Toss with sugar, cinnamon, lemon juice, and a touch of flour. Cook in butter until just tender, or use raw to fill a pie.

recipes.name: Apple Cheddar Grilled Cheese
recipes.about: Grilled cheese with sharp cheddar and thinly sliced apple on buttered bread.
recipes.method: Butter the outside of two bread slices. Layer thin apple slices and shredded sharp cheddar inside. Grill in a pan over medium until cheese melts and bread is golden.

recipes.name: Caramel Apples
recipes.about: Apples coated in caramel — a classic fall treat.
recipes.method: Insert wooden sticks into firm apples. Dip in just-melted caramel; let excess drip off. Set on parchment until firm.

recipes.name: Strawberry Shortcake
recipes.about: Macerated strawberries with whipped cream over biscuits.
recipes.method: Macerate halved strawberries with sugar 30 minutes. Whip cream with vanilla. Split biscuits and layer with berries and cream.

recipes.name: Caesar Dressing
recipes.about: Anchovy, garlic, parmesan, lemon, and olive oil — emulsified.
recipes.method: Mash anchovies, garlic, and salt into a paste. Whisk in mustard and lemon juice, then olive oil to emulsify. Stir in grated parmesan.

recipes.name: Fennel Orange Arugula Salad
recipes.about: Shaved fennel with orange segments and arugula, dressed with olive oil.
recipes.method: Shave fennel paper-thin (a mandoline helps). Segment oranges over a bowl to catch juice. Toss fennel, oranges, and arugula with olive oil and the captured juice; salt to taste.
